nasb.text: Then Jacob said to Joseph, “God Almighty appeared to me at Luz in the land of Canaan and blessed me,

esv.text: And Jacob said to Joseph, “God Almighty appeared to me at Luz in the land of Canaan and blessed me,

cnv.text: 雅各對約瑟說：“全能的　神曾經在迦南地的路斯向我顯現，賜福給我，

ccb.text: 对约瑟说：“全能的上帝曾经在迦南的路斯向我显现，赐福给我。

csbs.text: 雅各对约瑟说：“全能的神曾在迦南地的路斯向我显现，并祝福了我，
